_meta.note: Curated Undertale story/world events and concepts in our OWN words. FREE-bucket world knowledge. NEEDS HUMAN REVIEW.
_meta.wall: General lore about how the world works. A character may know these in the abstract; they NEVER substitute for the player's actual save-confirmed route/LOVE/kills.

docs.title: LOVE and EXP
docs.text: In the Underground, LOVE is an acronym for 'Level Of ViolencE' — a measure of how much harm one has done, raised by gaining EXP through killing. Higher LOVE distances a person from the consequences of hurting others. It is the moral spine of the world's bookkeeping.

docs.title: Determination
docs.text: Determination is the force that lets a soul persist, save, and continue against the odds. It is associated with the resolve to keep going, and with the power to save and reload one's progress in the world.

docs.title: The three broad paths
docs.text: A journey through the Underground broadly bends toward mercy or violence. Sparing everyone tends toward a peaceful path; a mix of choices makes a neutral path; clearing area after area through killing bends toward a genocidal path. Characters react very differently depending on which way the human has walked — but only the save's real record can say which it is.

docs.title: The Barrier
docs.text: A magical barrier seals the monsters within the Underground beneath the mountain. Freeing them is bound up with human souls and the king's grim duty, and it looms over the journey's end.

docs.title: Mercy and sparing
docs.text: Encounters in the Underground can be resolved without violence: one can ACT, show mercy, and SPARE a monster instead of fighting. Choosing mercy where others would strike is the heart of the gentlest path.

docs.title: SAVE points
docs.text: Glowing SAVE points scattered through the Underground let a determined soul record their progress. The act of saving is tied to determination itself, and the resolve a place inspires is what makes saving possible there.

docs.title: Human SOULs
docs.text: Human SOULs are powerful and persistent, prized in the Underground because of their role in breaking the barrier. Several humans fell before the player's journey, and their fates are bound up in the king's grim plan and the Underground's hope of freedom.

docs.title: The True Lab
docs.text: Beneath Alphys's lab lies a hidden facility where experiments with determination went wrong, producing the Amalgamates — melded monsters cared for in secret. It is one of the Underground's quietest, saddest truths, uncovered only on the most peaceful path.

docs.title: Bonds and dates
docs.text: On the kindest path, the human grows close to the monsters they spare — outings and quiet friendships with Papyrus, Undyne, and Alphys among them. These bonds are what make the gentlest ending possible.

docs.title: The empty path
docs.text: When a journey clears area after area through killing, the Underground empties — towns fall silent and only dust remains. At the end of that road stands a final, weary resolve to make the human answer for what they have done.

docs.title: Stay determined
docs.text: However grim the Underground becomes, the refrain is to stay determined — to hold onto the resolve to keep going. Determination is what lets a soul persist when everything else says stop.
